review_text: Totally unimpressed. Though delivery was expeditious, service was less than exemplary. In a conversation about the item, they state that it comes with a free bag, belt, and strings. None of these were included. When I contacted the vendor, they DM?d me and stated that these items were not included. I quoted the comment but got no reply. Nor did they reply to my question on the page. I have a screen shot as proof. The word ?kit? implies there are items included with the guitar, and it is standard to send a soft case with a guitar or ukulele. However, customers of this store don't even deserve the most basic of service. Nor do the sellers think they need to be transparent about their policies when answering questions. I have to wonder if the appalling service is because I?m a foreigner or a woman, and if the seller assumes I have no knowledge of guitars due to either of these factors. I would not suggest buying from such unscrupulous vendors. 0/10, would not recommend.
